reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

fixed_versions: Vulnerability fixed with update of Power-on-Demand public license server on 2026-06-24; no user actions necessary
mitigations: Avoid using sensitive or personal data in user, host and display names

Set the environmental variable STARLICENSEHIDE to 1. This will send the string "unknown" for the user, host and display name instead of the real values. The setting is  supported since version V8.04 (June 2013) of Simcenter STAR-CCM+

title: SSA-555707: Information Disclosure Vulnerability in Simcenter STAR-CCM+
